requirement_topic.en: TBS PVoC / CoC and IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 Evidence

summary.en: TBS implements product conformity assessment for certain categories of imported goods. For goods subject to PVoC, TBS states that consignments must obtain mandatory customs-clearance documents and a Certificate of Conformity before shipment, otherwise goods arriving at Tanzanian ports may be rejected or fined. For BESS, confirm the HS code and regulated status of battery racks, lithium cells or modules, PCS / inverters, containers, switchgear, cables, and controls. IEC 62619:2022 battery safety evidence and IEC 62933 electrical-energy-storage-system evidence may be requested where the applicable Tanzania standard, PVoC route, tender, project owner, insurer, lender, utility, or EWURA review calls them up.
summary.zh: TBS对若干类别进口商品实施产品合格评定。对于受PVoC监管的货物，TBS说明，货物在装运前必须取得强制清关文件和符合性证书，否则抵达坦桑尼亚港口后可能被拒收或罚款。对于BESS，应确认电池架、锂电芯或模组、PCS/逆变器、集装箱、开关设备、电缆和控制系统的HS编码及受监管状态。适用的坦桑尼亚标准、PVoC路径、招标、项目业主、保险方、贷款方、公用事业单位或EWURA审查要求时，可能需要IEC 62619:2022电池安全证据和IEC 62933电能储能系统证据。
summary.zht: TBS對若干類別進口商品實施產品合格評定。對於受PVoC監管的貨物，TBS說明，貨物在裝運前必須取得強制清關文件和符合性證書，否則抵達坦尚尼亞港口後可能被拒收或罰款。對於BESS，應確認電池架、鋰電芯或模組、PCS/逆變器、集裝箱、開關設備、電纜和控制系統的HS編碼及受監管狀態。適用的坦尚尼亞標準、PVoC路徑、招標、項目業主、保險方、貸款方、公用事業單位或EWURA審查要求時，可能需要IEC 62619:2022電池安全證據和IEC 62933電能儲能系統證據。

standards_or_laws: TBS Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for regulated imported goods

summary.en: China BESS files commonly include GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 reports. These can support a Tanzania technical file, but they do not by themselves establish TBS PVoC status, CoC acceptance, IEC-format testing, HS-code treatment, or Tanzania project approval.
summary.zh: 中国BESS文件通常包括GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023报告。这些文件可支持坦桑尼亚技术资料包，但本身不能确定TBS PVoC状态、CoC接受性、IEC格式测试、HS编码处理或坦桑尼亚项目批准。
summary.zht: 中國BESS文件通常包括GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023報告。這些文件可支持坦尚尼亞技術資料包，但本身不能確定TBS PVoC狀態、CoC接受性、IEC格式測試、HS編碼處理或坦尚尼亞項目批准。

gap.en: Before shipment, classify each BESS component by HS code, check the current TBS PVoC and destination-inspection lists, and ask the selected PVoC service provider whether China GB evidence is acceptable only as support or whether IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 reports are required for the shipment or project.
gap.zh: 出货前，应按HS编码分类每个BESS部件，核查现行TBS PVoC和目的地检验清单，并向选定的PVoC服务机构确认中国GB证据仅能作为支持材料，还是该货批或项目需要IEC 62619 / IEC 62933报告。
gap.zht: 出貨前，應按HS編碼分類每個BESS部件，核查現行TBS PVoC和目的地檢驗清單，並向選定的PVoC服務機構確認中國GB證據僅能作為支持材料，還是該貨批或項目需要IEC 62619 / IEC 62933報告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the BESS component falls within TBS-regulated PVoC or destination-inspection goods; IEC 62619 / IEC 62933 evidence is mandatory only where called up by the applicable Tanzania standard, PVoC route, authority, utility, tender, insurer, lender, or contract
mandatory_status.cn: GB 44240-2024 is mandatory for covered China domestic electric-energy-storage lithium-ion cells and batteries; GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 are recommended unless incorporated by regulation or contract

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not assume a China GB report clears Tanzania import conformity. Confirm TBS-regulated status by HS code and obtain CoC / IEC evidence where the Tanzania route requires it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应假定中国GB报告即可完成坦桑尼亚进口合格评定。应按HS编码确认TBS监管状态，并在坦桑尼亚路径要求时取得CoC/IEC证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應假定中國GB報告即可完成坦尚尼亞進口合格評定。應按HS編碼確認TBS監管狀態，並在坦尚尼亞路徑要求時取得CoC/IEC證據。
